name: eduator-ai-v2
description: AI-Powered Educational Platform - Transforming learning through intelligent automation
author: Eduator Team

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:erp" "npm run dev:marketing"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @eduator/config && npm run build -w @eduator/db
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @eduator/api-server
scripts.build:erp: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w erp-app
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w erp-app && npm run build -w marketing-site
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf packages/*/node_modules && rm -rf apps/*/node_modules && rm -rf packages/*/dist && rm -rf apps/*/.next
